title: Trump Misstates Facts in Charlotte Refugee Case
summary: Trump incorrectly linked a Charlotte murder suspect to open borders, when the suspect was a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of factual accuracy in political discourse concerning immigration and crime.
